subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the True One! The grievous and astounding tidings of this fresh calamity have darkened all hearts and troubled the souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق خبر موحش و مدهش مصیبت جدیده دلها را مکدر نمود و جانها را
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
